channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19217] 2.15.6_8 kernel comes up with Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: crashkernel: unrecognized char: i
item.environment:
REDHAT_SUPPORT_PRODUCT_VERSION="8.10"
Red Hat Enterprise Linux release 8.10 (Ootpa)
Red Hat Enterprise Linux release 8.10 (Ootpa)
toss-release-4.8-11
item.summary: 2.15.6_8 kernel comes up with Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: crashkernel: unrecognized char: i

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
ul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: SRAT: PXM 1 -> APIC 0x0072 -> Node 1 Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: SRAT: PXM 0 -> APIC 0x0034 -> Node 0 Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: SRAT: PXM 1 -> APIC 0x0074 -> Node 1 Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: ACPI: SRAT: Node 0 PXM 0 [mem 0x00000000-0x7fffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: ACPI: SRAT: Node 0 PXM 0 [mem 0x100000000-0x207fffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: ACPI: SRAT: Node 1 PXM 1 [mem 0x2080000000-0x407fffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: NUMA: Initialized distance table, cnt=2 Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: NUMA: Node 0 [mem 0x00000000-0x7fffffff] + [mem 0x100000000-0x207fffffff] -> [mem 0x00000000-0x207fffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: NODE_DATA(0) allocated [mem 0x207ffd5000-0x207fffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: NODE_DATA(1) allocated [mem 0x407ffd4000-0x407fffefff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: crashkernel: unrecognized char: i Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: Zone ranges: Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: DMA [mem 0x0000000000001000-0x0000000000ffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: DMA32 [mem 0x0000000001000000-0x00000000ffffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: Normal [mem 0x0000000100000000-0x000000407fffffff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: Device empty Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: Movable zone start for each node Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: Early memory node ranges Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: node 0: [mem 0x0000000000001000-0x000000000009cfff] Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: node 0: [mem 0x0000000000100000-0x00000000502e2fff]

Jul 31 06:35:06 pmds1 kernel: node 0: [mem 0x00000000504ad000-0x0000000050767fff]
